comparison_contract: All stages use the same original row IDs: final LEGIT-kept rows intersected with identity-only generation successes. Thresholds are fit once on original rows.

ocr_contract.character_by_character: render each Unicode code point independently, classify its TrOCR visual-encoder embedding against rendered ASCII alphanumeric prototypes, then concatenate
ocr_contract.target_recovery_rate: exact normalized OCR recovery among label=1 rows
ocr_contract.whole_word: render and OCR the full candidate string

typopegging.attack_aware_diagnostic: reported separately; it includes the new identity atlas and seed file and must not be presented as a model frozen before the revision
typopegging.implementation: position-weighted edit-distance baseline with frozen visual-confusion-matrix substitution costs
typopegging.note: This follows the Liu et al. conceptual baseline described in the thesis; it is not claimed to be the authors' exact code.
